title: Local farms thrive with participatory guarantee systems
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"RHEENENDAL NEWS - Participatory Guarantee Systems (PGS) recently promoted organic farming and community development in the Garden Route through a locally focused quality assurance system.","html":"RHEENENDAL NEWS - Participatory Guarantee Systems (PGS) recently promoted organic farming and community development in the Garden Route through a locally focused quality assurance system."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It is an organic certification that encourages the public to be involved in the certification process on local farms."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"A notable example is Homtini Organic Farm in Rheenendal, which over the weekend once more demonstrated dedication to organic excellence through regenerative practices like grazing Nguni cattle and employing local women.","html":"A notable example is Homtini Organic Farm in Rheenendal, which over the weekend once more demonstrated dedication to organic excellence through regenerative practices like grazing Nguni cattle and employing local women."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The farm undergoes annual PGS inspections, ensuring compliance with organic standards and implements sustainable water management practices. - Ivandre Kangela","html":"The farm undergoes annual PGS inspections, ensuring compliance with organic standards and implements sustainable water management practices. - Ivandre Kangela"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Local farms thrive with participatory guarantee systems
